title: Bloom Energy Corp (BE) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Bloom Energy reported Q4 2025 and full-year results demonstrating continued strong momentum. Full-year 2025 revenue reached $2.02 billion, an increase of 37.3% compared to $1.47 billion in 2024. The company delivered record revenue driven by significant growth from the AI data center industry and continued strong demand from the commercial and industrial business. Q4 2025 revenue reached $777.7 million, exceeding anticipated $640.07 million by 21.5%. The company posted an earnings per share of $0.45, outperforming the forecasted $0.30, marking a 50% surprise. Q4 gross margin was 31.9% with adjusted EBITDA of $271.6 million. Product backlog increased 140% year over year to approximately $6 billion. Service backlog was approximately $14 billion. 2026 revenue guidance provided range of $3.1 billion to $3.3 billion. 2026 non-GAAP gross margin guidance is approximately 32%. 2026 non-GAAP operating income guidance is $425 million to $475 million. Management emphasized continued execution on manufacturing expansion and strategic partnerships to meet surging demand.
